subcodes.title: Words to Mr Esslemont and Mrs True, spoken around Nov. 1919
subcodes.first_line: As to the House of Spirituality the first question relates to its election. The election should be carried out with sincerity and goodwill.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @elections, @unity; oneness of humanity, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
